title: Fluorescent immunoprecipitation analysis
steps: Wash cells with cold PBS 2 times and resuspend in 1 ml of cold PBS.
Add 30 μL of cyanine succinimidyl ester stock solution in dimethyl sulfoxide (10 mg/mL) to cells and incubate for 20 min on ice.
Remove unreacted dye by washing cells with cold PBS 2 times.

Lyse cells in lysis buffer (1 ml lysis buffer per 50 million cells) containing 20 mM Tris-HCl (pH 8.0), 1% Triton X-100, 150 mM NaCl, 5 mM EDTA, and a mixture of inhibitors including 1 mM PMSF, 10 mM NaF, and 1 mM Na3VO4. Incubate for 30 min at 4 °C.
Pellet cell debris by centrifugation at 20,000 g for 15 min at 4 °C.
Preclear cell lysates by overnight rotation at 4 °C with normal mouse IgG covalently linked to CNBr-Sepharose.
Transfer precleared lysates to AffiGel Hz hydrazide agarose beads coupled to mAb.Rotate samples for 2 h at 4 °C.
Wash the beads 4 times with lysis buffer.
Elute proteins by heating the beads in SDS-sample buffer for 5 min at 80 °C.

Transfer affinity beads into tubes and wash 2 times with lysis buffer. The amount of beads neeaded depends on the antibody affinity and antibody/beads ratio as well as on cell lysate volume. Wash beads by centrifugation at 3000 g for 30 s.
creator: Natalia Kruglova
